name: Rahul Menon
message: Asmar owns his modules end to end. He took our AI-powered HRMS from concept to delivery with clean, well-documented Odoo code and handled the OpenAI integration without a hitch. Reliable under deadlines and a genuine problem-solver.

name: Ahmed Al Mansoori
message: As our Odoo System Administrator, Asmar keeps the ERP running smoothly and constantly finds ways to automate manual work. Responsive, dependable, and he explains technical decisions in plain language the whole team understands.

name: Sarah Thompson
message: The QuickBooks–Odoo connector Asmar built keeps our invoices, payments, customers and vendors perfectly in sync. Version migrations were seamless and we haven't had to re-enter accounting data since. It just works.

name: Priya Nair
message: The AI recruitment add-on Asmar developed screens résumés and scores candidates automatically against the job description. It cut our shortlisting time dramatically while keeping the process consistent and fair.

name: Daniel Roberts
message: Asmar delivered our Delivery Control app across POS, web and a driver portal. He understood the business workflow first and then built exactly what we needed — fast in-store screens and end-to-end tracking. Highly recommended.

name: Vishnu Krishnan
message: I've worked alongside Asmar on several connector projects — Shopify, Xero, Microsoft Teams. He writes maintainable code, communicates clearly, and is exactly who you want on the team when a migration deadline is tight.
